prompt: Analyze the forces acting on the topmost positive charge (+Q) and indicate the direction of the net force on it. Note: the size of each sphere does not represent the charge magnitude; use the label inside each sphere to determine its charge.

Analyze the forces acting on the top-right positive charge (+Q) and determine the direction of its net force. Note: sphere size does not indicate charge magnitude; use the label inside each sphere to identify the charge.
